questions.question: What is the purpose of the Daily Scrum?
What is the role of the Product Owner?
keyPoints: To define and prioritize the product backlog
To ensure the team has a clear understanding of the product requirements

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Sprint Review?
keyPoints: To demonstrate the work completed during the Sprint

questions.question: What is the role of the Scrum Master?
keyPoints: To ensure the team follows the Scrum framework

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Sprint Retrospective?
Describe the Scrum framework and its components.
keyPoints: Roles (Product Owner, Scrum Master, Development Team)
Meetings (Daily Scrum, Sprint Review, Sprint Retrospective)

questions.question: Explain the Agile principles and their application in software development.
Compare and contrast the Scrum framework with other Agile methodologies.
keyPoints: Other Agile methodologies (Kanban, Lean, Extreme Programming)
